generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TempSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TempSensor1, DS18S20TempSensor2, DS18S20TempSensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air (air heat capacity) and G_box (thermal conductance of the box)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater (heater heat capacity), C_air (air heat capacity), G_heater (heater conductance), G_box (box conductance)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ messaging server for transmitting temperature data from physical sensors to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for processing sensor data and controlling actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance PythonScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization of thermal model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance PCBDesignToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design software for creating custom circuit boards with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
    DTDFVocab:enables PCBDesignService
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214 × 214 × 3 mm) for heating the incubator, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers with up to 4A current"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s for air circulation in the incubator"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for driving heatbed and fan actuators"
]

instance MOSFET : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MOSFET for high-current control of heatbed (4A)"
]

instance Optocoupler : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocoupler for electrical isolation in PCB circuit"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for processing sensor data and controlling actuators"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the incubator system"
]

instance IncubatorChamber : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting system temperature using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperaturePrediction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for monitoring system for faults through temperature anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for controlling heating and cooling via bang-bang logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlDecision
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing heating parameters using model-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParameters
]

instance PCBDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for designing and validating PCB layouts for the incubator control system"
    DTDFVocab:provides PCBDesignInsight
]

instance RealTimeTemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature predictions for system behavior based on thermal models"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert for detected faults in the incubator system"
]

instance ControlDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action for heating cycles using bang-bang logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimizedParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized thermal parameters for improved system performance"
]

instance PCBDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validated PCB design for optimal component placement and circuit functionality"
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, DS18S20TempSensor1, DS18S20TempSensor2, DS18S20TempSensor3, RaspberryPiController, IncubatorChamber, PowerSupply, PCB, MOSFET, Optocoupler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the DT are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system comprising RabbitMQ server (on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and thermal simulation models, communicating via RabbitMQ message queue."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates during the 'as operated' phase of the physical system's lifecycle, integrating deployed models for real-time monitoring and control post-deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation of uniform temperature assumption via sensor placement experiments (max 7°C discrepancy with 12V fan), residual error minimization during calibration, and model parameter optimization against experimental data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication via RabbitMQ server running on Raspberry Pi, handling data exchange between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) hosted on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B single-board computer."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol integrated into the low-level driver to prevent unsafe actuator states, ensuring physical system safety during operations."
]
